blocks.content: Aegis's wide-area communication spread.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Urgent! Yahweh2 and the Operator are in a standoff!

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Golden Wheel's first team, should we provide support?
Golden Wheel members checked the satellite video.
Wild West, with smoke rising from his .44 Magnum, gaped like a fool.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: What? It's real?
Around them, West Country users lay sprawled with holes in their foreheads.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: Should we go? If we end it here, it's over. Since they've taken the bait, we can drop the Solar War.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: Yolga's son communicated.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: Just wait. The outcome won't be decided early on.
Fermi, who gave the order, thought.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: The Solar War win rates for the East and West Countries are almost 50-50. But their victory patterns differ.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Excluding the invincible user, the Operator, the East Country's power is rated higher.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Ascension's guild members are also highly skilled, but Golden Wheel is a company of professionals.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Yet, the win rate is still 50-50.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: This shows what the Operator means to West Country users.
Aegis opened a private communication channel.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Boss, what do you think? If we've really drawn out the Operator, this is an opportunity.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: There's no need for the East Country to sacrifice.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Even so, the agreement is a duel. Both the winner and loser must accept it.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: But a direct confrontation has no chance of winning.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Yahweh2 admitted it himself.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: An undefeated record.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: In a Solar War with thousands of users clashing, never dying is practically impossible.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Therefore, the record must have been managed.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: If he wanted, Fermi could also have an undefeated record.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: But there's no reason for that.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: In a system where you revive after dying, how inefficient is it to care about honor?

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: In High Gear, dying is also a tactic. But the Operator can't do that anymore.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: It's a matter that affects not just personal honor but the morale of the entire West Country.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Let's watch. As long as Yahweh2 focuses on the Solar War, the Operator won't hit him hard.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Shirone is right.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Understood.
Ending the private communication, Aegis relayed Fermi's instructions through wide-area communication.
Meanwhile, Yahweh2 and the Operator were engaged in a fierce probing battle.
Broadcast satellites, live-streaming to all continents of High Gear, zoomed in on the two.

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: Wow…
Users gathered in front of large screens were mesmerized by their battle.

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: The four legendary grades.

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: Not only was it the first time someone had collected them all, but their skill in handling the parts was superhuman.
A light sphere vibrated above Yahweh2's palm.

blocks.speaker: Yahweh2
blocks.content: Michelangelo.
Dodging the rapid flashes, the Operator braked by extending one foot.
Simultaneously, her back opened, and a mechanical frame with gun barrels swung over her shoulders.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Black Gun.
Every time ion cannons fired from the two barrels, the frame shook back and forth.
Matching Michelangelo's speed, Shirone's time-sense slowed the flow of time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Seeing the Operator between the ion cannons scraping the ground in two rows was chilling.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How is she so fast?
Her delicate fist, sharp as an awl, grazed Yahweh2's cheek.

blocks.speaker: Yahweh2
blocks.content: Phew!
Immediately, her other fist flew in and struck Shirone's side hard.
Boom!
Though Raphael's strong armor activated, the machine was sent flying.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The machine itself is a weapon.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Top rankers are all strong, but the Operator seemed to focus more on the machine's performance than firepower.
As Yahweh2 landed, dragging along the ground, East and West Country forces crossed, blocking the view.

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: Kahaha! I'll take Yahweh2!
Above the crowd, a machine over 8 meters tall fired a rotary cannon.

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: Code name Bishamonten.
As large bullets scraped the sides, East Country users were shattered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A monstrous form.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In reality, a person with two arms would struggle to control a machine with four arms.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yet he handles it like his own body. It means the avatar itself is huge. Is he a demon?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Since any dreaming creature can enter Under Coder, it's uncertain.
Bishamonten activated his booster and charged.

blocks.speaker: Bishamonten
blocks.content: Is this all?
From lenses on both shoulders, plasma beams spread out in a fan shape.
As the beams swept forward with a roar, dozens of East Country users' armor melted.

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: Aaah!
As Bishamonten smiled at the pleasing screams, his back felt a chill.

blocks.speaker: Bishamonten
blocks.content: Turning his head 180 degrees, he saw Shirone with a massive light sphere.

blocks.speaker: Bishamonten
blocks.content: Damn! Is he a bat?
As Bishamonten crossed his arms to block, his forearms opened, transforming into thick armor.
The flash struck the armor plate directly.
Ugh…
The machine shook with a thud, and the 80-ton machine slid across the ground.

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: Aaah!
Finally, the armor plate of the fallen Bishamonten was horribly dented, and East Country rankers rushed in.

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: You bastard! Just wait!
As his dying words echoed, the Operator slid in with her legs spread wide.
A black sword was in her hand.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Checkmate.
As the bat opened, Shirone jumped through codes to escape behind the Operator.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What he saw then was…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Oh no.'

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The black sword's blade coming at his neck.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Foolish, Yahweh2. I know all your positions.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even if he jumped through codes, he couldn't escape the designer's intent.
As High Gear roared at full output, the blade drew a terrifying arc.
Sparks flew from the black sword.
Clang!
Just the fact that the Operator's arm was raised indicated the bullet's power.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: Gehgehgeh! Don't forget about me.
Turning to the side, Shirone saw Wild West spinning his .44 Magnum.
Though called a .44 Magnum, it was the most powerful single-shot weapon in High Gear.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: It's the Solar War.
Watching the East Country users charging from afar, she bent her legs.
With her arm over her head, aiming her black sword, she said, '…Bring it on.'

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: If you push too hard, your undefeated record might get tarnished. How about staying quietly in the palace, lady?
The Operator checked the satellite video.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: We're being pushed back.
It's just the beginning, but East Country users were concentrating here.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: If the undefeated Operator was the morale of the West Country, defeating her was the morale of the East Country.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Not stepping in might help.
Though she thought so, the Operator's resolve dug deeper into the ground.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Then try to defeat me.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: She considered it a reward for Yahweh2, who took the Solar War seriously.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: This might be your only chance. And maybe… Yahweh2 is undefeated too?
People watching the broadcast murmured.

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: What does she mean? Yahweh2 isn't even a ranker, why does the Operator care so much?

blocks.speaker: Broadcast
blocks.content: Yeah, he's just famous.
Meanwhile, rankers actually fighting the Solar War felt it in their bones.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: 'This Solar War is different from usual.'
Golden Wheel's entire guild was moving to support Yahweh2.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: Wild West, mouth agape, fell into thought.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: Is she saying Yahweh2's death isn't free from morale? Well, the risk is higher for us at level 307.
Aegis communicated.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: The boss's order is to proceed as planned.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Okay.
Wild West raised his gun.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: Let's go.
As powerful bullets fired, the Operator moved her black sword, leaving afterimages.
The sparks from the blade signaled the clash between East and West Country forces.
The scene spread through the broadcast screen.
Even users fighting the Solar War kept the screen open, showing intense interest.
Rankers gathered, and even second-team members joined, turning the battlefield with Yahweh2 into the Solar War's core.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Hey! Look at the broadcast screen! Is that me on the screen? That's me!

blocks.speaker: Death Princess
blocks.content: It is. We're on the main screen of the Solar War. Are we becoming famous? Hohoho!

blocks.speaker: Strongest Code Name
blocks.content: We're already famous. Users across the continent are watching us.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Alright! I'm the Destroyer!
As Destroyer707 increased output and charged, augmented reality flickered off.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: 'Huh?'
Moments later, his machine exploded, and Death Princess and Strongest Code Name turned like mirrors.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Destroyer!
West Country ranker Little Witch stood on the broken machine.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Hello?
Though just a simulation, hearing her voice made their souls freeze.
Moments later, two explosions followed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'What?'
Shirone confirmed his friends' deaths but had no time to worry about it.
Aegis joined the battlefield.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Yahweh2. I'll cover you.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Backup charger…'
Just before Shirone retreated, Little Witch unleashed all her grenades.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Get Yahweh2!
Realizing her words, West Country rankers focused their firepower, causing an explosion.
Phew!
Stumbling out as a bat, Shirone saw a shadow in the smoke.
It was Wild West.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: Gehgehgeh.
Isolated by the bombardment, he kept pulling the trigger, spinning the empty magazine.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: Unlucky.
The Operator, appearing like a ghost, slashed his High Gear with her black sword.
The sound of the machine being pierced was heard.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: …Good judgment.
Jumping through codes as a bat, Shirone took the sword hit in front of Wild West.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Better I die.'
Wild West met Yahweh2's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Wild West
blocks.content: A debt.
Even as electricity flowed through his machine, his hand loaded the magazine.
The black sword withdrew.
Bang! Bang! Bang!
The Operator dodged sideways.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'That's dangerous.'
As the grenade smoke cleared, the broadcast screen showed all Solar War users flinching.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'What?'
Yahweh2 was down.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'One win for now.'
Coldly counting, the Operator leaped to find another prey.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: 'Considering the power, the sacrifice was good. But what about East Country's morale?'
Aegis communicated with Fermi.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Yahweh2 is dead! He's back at the starting point! Should we retreat from the battle zone?

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Just hold on. He'll come back.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: But East Country's morale is…

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: It will rise.
What?

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: As Aegis squinted and asked again, Fermi couldn't hold back his laughter.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Hehehe. Hehehehe.
If he truly becomes a High Gear user…

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Boss?

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Hold on.
Fermi's fierce speed transmitted through the communication frequency.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: That will be the most exciting place.
